title: volume create: cannot access plugin image socket
body:
Seen in [f36 root container sqlite](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5803267419013120/html/int-podman-fedora-36-root-container-sqlite.log.html#t--volume-create-and-remove-with-running-plugin-succeeds--1):
```
  volume create and remove with running plugin succeeds
...
# podman [options] run --security-opt label=disable -v /run/docker/plugins:/run/docker/plugins -v /tmp/podman_test4173916758/volumes:/tmp/podman_test4173916758/volumes -d quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:20220623 --sock-name image --path /tmp/podman_test4173916758/volumes
6be4ef5428b0cae578d0966c658861f72e487caccb16c6af0e8e1f3723bb6172
# podman [options] volume create --driver image testVolume1
Error: volume testVolume1 uses volume plugin image but it could not be retrieved: cannot access plugin image socket "/run/docker/plugins/image.sock": stat /run/docker/plugins/image.sock: no such file or directory
```
